title: Company Founded
description: Healisys Solutions was established with a focus on delivering practical software solutions for businesses across India. Our domain healisyssolutions.com was registered on 24 April 2010.

title: Web & Desktop Expansion
description: Expanded into custom web applications and Windows desktop software, serving SMEs that needed reliable internal tools and customer-facing platforms.

title: Mobile & Cloud Adoption
description: Added mobile app development and cloud-ready architectures, helping clients move beyond on-premise systems toward scalable, accessible solutions.

title: Enterprise Partnerships
description: Began delivering larger enterprise applications with API integrations, database modernisation, and long-term maintenance support contracts.

title: Full-Stack Product Delivery
description: Strengthened end-to-end capabilities across UI/UX, QA, DevOps, and cross-platform development — from discovery through post-launch support.

title: Trusted Technology Partner
description: Today we partner with organisations across India on web, mobile, custom software, and enterprise systems — with 15+ years of delivery experience.
